title: Resize Event
description: Occurs when the control is resized.
see_also:
Applies To

Form

Click Event

GUI Items: Resize Event

Form
examples:
Function frmMain_Resize(Sender$ As String)

		  Integer width

		  GGet frmMain.Width, width

		  GSet frmMain.btnOK.Left, width / 2 - 100

		  GSet frmMain.btnCancel.Left, width / 2 + 10

Fend
